title: The Haunting of the Hinterkaifeck Farm

segments.text: In 1922, six members of the Gruber family were brutally murdered.
The murders took place at their isolated farm in Germany.
Despite numerous investigations, the case remains one of Germany's darkest mysteries.
Locals reported strange sounds and sightings leading up to the crime.
Theories abound, including family feuds and unknown intruders.
A chilling case that still sparks fear in rural communities.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: The 1922 Hinterkaifeck murders remain one of Germany's most chilling unsolved cases. Follow for daily cold cases!
